case_title: ELITE SAN FRANCISCO VS DUITSMAN NATALIE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $832.00 FILED BY ELITE SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT DUITSMAN NATALIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-26-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 04

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ELITE SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DUITSMAN NATALIE $832.00 PRINCIPAL, $36.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $868.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT DUITSMAN NATALIE HEARING SET FOR OCT-24-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-26-1991, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-18-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 06
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF OCT-24-1991, GRANTED
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ELITE SAN FRANCISCO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DUITSMAN NATALIE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DUITSMAN NATALIE
